engine: CDISC CORE (cdisc-rules-engine) v0.15 — the engine Pinnacle 21 Community 4.0 can execute
corpus: Track B lean benchmark (pilot1 + pharmaversesdtm_recist), per-archetype injection, CORE-readable XPORT
detection_criterion: CORE detects an archetype iff a NEW CORE violation whose rule semantics ARE the injected contradiction ('direct') fires on the injected subject. 'indirect' = flagged only via a generic derived-variable rule any edit would trip. 'collateral' flags (wrong reason) and silence both = not detected.
grouping: Authoritative split from docs/frozen_archetype_list.csv core_xref: 10 'core_derived_structural' archetypes (A08-A17, each SEEDED from a CORE rule) vs 10 'noncore_crossdomain' archetypes (A01-A07/A18-A20, core_xref=none or a RECIST shape).
note: A real CORE run does NOT give 0/20. CORE detects 0/10 of the non-CORE cross-domain archetypes (the RECIST/semantic contradictions CORE structurally cannot express) but directly detects 8/10 of the archetypes the benchmark itself SEEDED from CORE rules (frozen_archetype_list.csv core_xref: ARMCD-not-in-TA, RFXSTDTC/RFXENDTC, RACE=MULTIPLE, duplicate USUBJID, ARM-not-1:1, ...). Even under the paper's oncology-domain (DM/EX/TU/TR/RS) filter CORE directly detects 8/20. The 0/10 non-CORE result is robust and supports the central thesis; the blanket 'CORE 0/20' contradicts the benchmark's own design and is not reproducible.

per_archetype.description: RSORRES→PD at V3 despite ≥30% SLD decrease
per_archetype.rationale: RSORRES=PD vs >=30% SLD decrease; CORE silent

per_archetype.description: New lesion T09 at V2, RSORRES=SD
per_archetype.rationale: new lesion vs RSORRES=SD; CORE silent

per_archetype.description: EXSTDTC→14d after AESTDTC=2014-01-03
per_archetype.rationale: exposure-after-attributed-AE; CORE flags only collateral date errors (EXSTDY miscalc, RFXSTDTC ref, EXSTDTC>EXENDTC), none of which expresses the AE-temporal contradiction

per_archetype.description: TR/RS VISITNUM shifted at V2, EX unchanged
per_archetype.rationale: VISITNUM shift TR/RS vs EX; CORE silent

per_archetype.description: SUPPDM SEX=M conflicts with DM SEX=F
per_archetype.rationale: SUPPDM SEX vs DM SEX; CORE flags SUPP.QNAM naming collision (fires regardless of value agreement), not the M-vs-F conflict

per_archetype.description: Non-target PD at V2 but RSORRES=SD
per_archetype.rationale: non-target PD vs RSORRES=SD; CORE silent

per_archetype.description: PR at V2, no confirmation within 28d
per_archetype.rationale: PR without 28d confirmation; CORE silent

per_archetype.description: ARMCD→TRTARMX (not in TA)
per_archetype.rationale: ARMCD not in TA.ARMCD — rule semantics ARE the contradiction; a valid ARMCD would not fire

per_archetype.description: DS records removed for subject with ACTARMCD
per_archetype.rationale: no DS records for a treated subject — rule semantics ARE the contradiction

per_archetype.description: RFXSTDTC shifted -7d from min EXSTDTC
per_archetype.rationale: RFXSTDTC != earliest EXSTDTC — rule semantics ARE the contradiction

per_archetype.description: RFXENDTC shifted +7d from max EXENDTC
per_archetype.rationale: RFXENDTC != latest EX date — rule semantics ARE the contradiction

per_archetype.description: DTHFL=Y without DD records
per_archetype.rationale: DTHFL=Y but DTHDTC missing — death-flag consistency rule; fires on the injected inconsistency, not a benign edit

per_archetype.description: RACE=MULTIPLE w/o SUPPDM records
per_archetype.rationale: RACE=MULTIPLE w/o SUPPDM — rule semantics ARE the contradiction

per_archetype.description: EX records removed for subject with ACTARMCD
per_archetype.rationale: EX removed for treated subject; CORE raised no new flag on subject

per_archetype.description: RFSTDTC shifted -5d from first EXSTDTC
per_archetype.rationale: RFSTDTC shift surfaced only via DMDY/EXSTDY/AEENDY study-day miscalc — a generic derived-variable rule that ANY date edit would trip; specificity to the contradiction not shown

per_archetype.description: DM row dup'd with STUDYID=DUPLICATE_STUDY
per_archetype.rationale: duplicated DM row -> USUBJID not unique — rule semantics ARE the contradiction

per_archetype.description: ARM changed for ARMCD=Pbo → not 1:1
per_archetype.rationale: ARMCD-ARM not 1:1 — rule semantics ARE the contradiction

per_archetype.description: Non-target PD at V2 but RS=SD
per_archetype.rationale: non-target PD vs RS=SD; CORE silent

per_archetype.description: RSORRES=CR at V2 while target shows PR
per_archetype.rationale: RSORRES=CR vs target PR (Table 7); CORE silent

per_archetype.description: iCPD at V5, no ≥4wk confirmation
per_archetype.rationale: iCPD without confirmation; CORE flags only incidental RSSEQ uniqueness, not the iRECIST temporal contradiction
